name: 简约居中标题
author: r-markdown
content:
<!-- 素材开始 -->
<container direction="column" align="center-center" margin="20px 0">
<text color="#f39c12" weight="900" margin="0 0 -6px" size="18px">PART 1</text>

<container padding="5px 20px" bg="#27ae60" radius="50px">
<text weight="700" color="#ffffff">养生，从今天开始</text>
</container>

<container width="100%" extra-style="justify-content:center;gap:10px" margin="-5px 0 0">
<container width="10px" height="10px" bg="#ff9300" radius="50%"></container>
<container width="10px" height="10px" bg="#667eea" radius="50%"></container>
<container width="10px" height="10px" bg="#0984e3" radius="50%"></container>
</container>
</container>
<!-- 素材结束 -->
